Translation.Description: Spongy texture and slimy color to behold, A squishy squashy walk with feet ever cold, A busy buzzin' swarm to twirl and whirl around, A most sticky stride to stay firm on the ground.
Translation.Provides: Allows the unit to cast Insect Swarm
Sticky Goo - Enemies that strike the wearer are immobilized for 3 rounds unless they resist
